steps.title: Find the interior angle
steps.content:
The angle adjacent to $106^{\circ}$ is supplementary to it, so its measure is
$$180^{\circ}-106^{\circ}=74^{\circ}$$

steps.title: Use the exterior angle
steps.content:
The angle marked $x$ is an exterior angle of the triangle. It equals the sum of the two nonadjacent interior angles directly here.
$$x=23+74=97$$
The answer is 97.
